category_sources: Official rsyslog site at https://www.rsyslog.com/ describes it as a high-performance log ingestion and ETL engine.
display_name_sources: Official site and documentation use the name rsyslog.
docs_sources: Official docs domain contains rsyslog 8 documentation and configuration reference.
Official rsyslog site links documentation under the Help menu.
repo_sources: Official GitHub organization describes official rsyslog repositories.
Official rsyslog source-code page says rsyslog is available on GitHub and lists official git repositories.
tags_sources: Official rsyslog site describes log ingestion and ETL behavior.
